def solve(nums)
    sorted_abs = nums.map(&:abs).sort
    n = sorted_abs.length
    count = 0
    for i in 0...n do
        target = 2 * sorted_abs[i]
        low = i + 1
        high = n - 1
        best = i
        while low <= high do
            mid = (low + high) / 2
            mid = mid.to_i
            if sorted_abs[mid] <= target
                best = mid
                low = mid + 1
            else
                high = mid - 1
            end
        end
        count += best - i
    end
    count
end
```
